title: CleanSpark Partners with Submer to Develop AI Data Centers
text: CleanSpark announced a partnership with Submer, a leader in liquid-cooled data center solutions, to develop AI data centers across North America. The partnership leverages CleanSpark's gigawatt-scale power infrastructure with Submer's liquid cooling technology. CleanSpark will focus on site development and land acquisition while Submer provides technical expertise in modular data center design and deployment. The partnership is expected to accelerate CleanSpark's timeline to commercialize AI infrastructure and generate revenues from hyperscaler customers. The agreement covers more than 1 GW in operational power capacity with a pipeline exceeding 2 GW. The companies operate under a non-binding framework while working toward definitive contracts. The partnership demonstrates CleanSpark's strategic focus on infrastructure development to support AI computing growth.
